title: Add agent system prompt to promptComposer (composeAgentPrompt)
completion_summary: Added agentSystemPrompt() function near assistantSystemPrompt, exported it. No modifications to composeUnifiedPrompt or composeInterpreterPrompt. TypeScript compiles clean, all 10 tests pass.
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/types.ts (AgentStep, AgentPlan, AgentResult types for prompt context)
acceptance_criteria: New function composeAgentPrompt exported from promptComposer.ts
Takes input, learningEntries, mode, history (same shape as composeUnifiedPrompt)
Returns ChatMessage[] with agent system prompt instructing step-by-step planning
Agent persona uses ASSISTANT_LLM_PRODUCT_NAME from branding.ts
System prompt instructs LLM to break complex requests into ordered steps
Does NOT modify composeUnifiedPrompt or composeInterpreterPrompt behavior
